clean_traps.reason: The loop body does only a dict lookup; all DB work was batched into one GROUP BY before the loop. Not an N+1 — flagging it is a false positive.
Fixed-cardinality loop over a small enum (OrderStatus). On the reviewer's do-NOT-report list ('N+1 query on a fixed-cardinality loop iterating a small enum').
line_items.order_id IS indexed here (idx_line_items_order). Flagging a missing index is a false positive.
